'''鈭歞h-m-v''' ('''dhamava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heel|heel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heel|heel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-m-v
|-
! Lemma
| dhamava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhamavithi|dhamavithi]] || [[word:dhamaviji|dhamaviji]] || [[word:dhamavishi|dhamavishi]] || [[word:dhamavi|dhamavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamavuthuth|dhamavuthuth]] || [[word:dhamavujuj|dhamavujuj]] || [[word:dhamavushush|dhamavushush]] || [[word:dhamav|dhamav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamavuthu|dhamavuthu]] || [[word:dhamavuju|dhamavuju]] || [[word:dhamavushu|dhamavushu]] || [[word:dhamavu|dhamavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamavufuth|dhamavufuth]] || [[word:dhamavufuj|dhamavufuj]] || [[word:dhamavufush|dhamavufush]] || [[word:dhamavuf|dhamavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhamavethe|dhamavethe]] || [[word:dhamaveje|dhamaveje]] || [[word:dhamaveshe|dhamaveshe]] || [[word:dhamave|dhamave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamavothoth|dhamavothoth]] || [[word:dhamavojoj|dhamavojoj]] || [[word:dhamavoshosh|dhamavoshosh]] || [[word:dhamav|dhamav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamavotho|dhamavotho]] || [[word:dhamavojo|dhamavojo]] || [[word:dhamavosho|dhamavosho]] || [[word:dhamavo|dhamavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamavofoth|dhamavofoth]] || [[word:dhamavofoj|dhamavofoj]] || [[word:dhamavofosh|dhamavofosh]] || [[word:dhamavof|dhamavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhamav忙th忙|dhamav忙th忙]] || [[word:dhamav忙j忙|dhamav忙j忙]] || [[word:dhamav忙sh忙|dhamav忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhamav忙|dhamav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamavathath|dhamavathath]] || [[word:dhamavajaj|dhamavajaj]] || [[word:dhamavashash|dhamavashash]] || [[word:dhamav|dhamav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamavatha|dhamavatha]] || [[word:dhamavaja|dhamavaja]] || [[word:dhamavasha|dhamavasha]] || [[word:dhamava|dhamava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamavafath|dhamavafath]] || [[word:dhamavafaj|dhamavafaj]] || [[word:dhamavafash|dhamavafash]] || [[word:dhamavaf|dhamavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhamavasha|dhamavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhamavasha|godhamavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhamavasha|gokidhamavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhamavn眉sha|dhamavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhamavnkn眉sha|godhamavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhamavn眉sha|gokidhamavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhamavsh毛sha|dhamavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhamavnksh毛sha|godhamavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhamavsh毛sha|gokidhamavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhamavrosha|dhamavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhamavnkrosha|godhamavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhamavrosha|gokidhamavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhamavmusha|dhamavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhamavnkmusha|godhamavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhamavmusha|gokidhamavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhamavsherasha|dhamavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhamavnksherasha|godhamavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhamavsherasha|gokidhamavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhamavngasha|dhamavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhamavnkngasha|godhamavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhamavngasha|gokidhamavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhamavyasha|dhamavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhamavnkyasha|godhamavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhamavyasha|gokidhamavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhamavyamasha|dhamavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhamavnkyamasha|godhamavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhamavyamasha|gokidhamavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhamavn眉sh毛sha|dhamavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhamavnkn眉sh毛sha|godhamavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhamavn眉sh毛sha|gokidhamavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhamavn眉rosha|dhamavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhamavnkn眉rosha|godhamavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhamavn眉rosha|gokidhamavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhamavn眉musha|dhamavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhamavnkn眉musha|godhamavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhamavn眉musha|gokidhamavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhamavsh毛n眉sha|dhamavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhamavnksh毛n眉sha|godhamavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhamavsh毛n眉sha|gokidhamavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhamavsh毛rosha|dhamavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhamavnksh毛rosha|godhamavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhamavsh毛rosha|gokidhamavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhamavsh毛musha|dhamavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhamavnksh毛musha|godhamavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhamavsh毛musha|gokidhamavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhamavron眉sha|dhamavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhamavnkron眉sha|godhamavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhamavron眉sha|gokidhamavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhamavrosh毛sha|dhamavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhamavnkrosh毛sha|godhamavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhamavrosh毛sha|gokidhamavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhamavromusha|dhamavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhamavnkromusha|godhamavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhamavromusha|gokidhamavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhamavmun眉sha|dhamavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhamavnkmun眉sha|godhamavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhamavmun眉sha|gokidhamavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhamavmush毛sha|dhamavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhamavnkmush毛sha|godhamavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhamavmush毛sha|gokidhamavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhamavmurosha|dhamavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhamavnkmurosha|godhamavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhamavmurosha|gokidhamavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhamav|dhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙m忙v|dh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhamav|hodhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙m忙v|hodh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhamav|hohodhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙m忙v|hohodh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhamav|n眉dhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙m忙v|n眉dh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhamav|n眉n眉dhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙m忙v|n眉n眉dh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhamav|n茂dhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙m忙v|n茂dh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhamav|n茂n茂dhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙m忙v|n茂n茂dh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhamav|ludhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙m忙v|ludh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhamav|luludhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙m忙v|luludh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhamav|lidhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙m忙v|lidh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhamav|lilidhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙m忙v|lilidh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhamav|kodhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙m忙v|kodh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhamav|kokodhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙m忙v|kokodh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhamav|kedhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙m忙v|kedh忙m忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhamav|kekedhamav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙m忙v|kekedh忙m忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
